title: Farming Life in Another World GUI Pack
description: Overhauled Minecraft GUI in the theme off Farming Life in Another World.
body:

# Overview
From the lovable anime/manga Farming Life in Another World. Enjoy a overhauled GUI Minecraft experience with all the lovable girls and of course the mc Hiraku Machio.

## Recommended Modpack
- [**Farmbound Frontier**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/farmbound-frontier)

### Resourcepack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator using this Resourcepack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Resourcepack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Resourcepack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
